# claudeadmin_compliance_groups (Data Source)

Lists all groups visible to the Compliance API — includes SCIM-provisioned groups (with `source_type = scim` + `external_id` populated) and native Anthropic groups. Enterprise + Compliance API key with scope `read:compliance_org_data`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "claudeadmin_compliance_groups" "all" {}

output "scim_groups" {
  value = [
    for g in data.claudeadmin_compliance_groups.all.groups : g
    if g.source_type == "scim"
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

### Read-Only

- `groups` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--groups))

<a id="nestedatt--groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `groups`

- `display_name` (String)
- `external_id` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `member_count` (Number)
- `name` (String)
- `source_type` (String)
